backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Vijay Online Centre ICP backend, managing applications, user profiles, admin authentication, and application status transitions (submit, confirm, reject, set fee, confirm payment) with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding a `rejectionMessages` map to the existing state, preserving all prior application and credential data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin confirm/reject flow, customer rejection messaging, confirm-first QR reveal logic) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short descriptions of key frontend source files (AdminPage, useQueries, PaymentPage, App.tsx) for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vijay Online Centre React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, manages page navigation state (home, payment, dashboard, admin), and renders the appropriate page along with shared layout components like Header, Footer, and chat widgets.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: Floating chatbot UI component supporting bilingual (Hindi/English) conversation, quick-reply buttons, and markdown-style text formatting, backed by the `useChatbot` mutation hook.
Fixed floating action buttons providing WhatsApp and phone call links to the support number 8173064549.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details (phone, WhatsApp, hours), UPI payment info, and a copyright line with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop and mobile nav links for Home, Dashboard, Contact, and Admin pages, using a Page type for routing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Services, Applications, and Documents, exports a static ALL_SERVICES catalogue, and provides React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a navy-blue theme (light and dark), and utility classes for colors, glows, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that allows authenticated admins to view, filter, set fees, reject, and confirm payments for applications, with document preview support for images and files.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard page displaying application status stats, a list of submitted applications, and a document manager with upload and download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public home page showing a hero section, service search, and categorized government service cards fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Multi-step page handling application submission, document upload, UPI QR-based payment, and status polling through states like form, waiting, payment, verifying, success, and rejected.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), OKLCH-based color tokens (navy, electric-blue, gold, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 13) describing Vijay Online Centre's architecture, features, known issues, and the 'Upload First, Pay Later' flow with admin-controlled UPI/QR payment confirmation and per-customer fee entry.
